items.event_title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Czechia vs Mexico
items.text_on_image: Světový fotbalový večer / World Football Night
items.image_prompt: An emotional cinematic social media poster showing a symbolic football stadium atmosphere with fans holding smartphones capturing the moment. The visible text on the image is bilingual in Czech and English: 'Světový fotbalový večer / World Football Night'. The tone is energetic and fan hype, with subtle glowing music notes and sound waves around the smartphone. No official logos, badges, real player faces or trademarked branding. Suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Facebook vertical 9:16 social poster.
items.reels_text: Feel the energy as Czechia faces Mexico in the World Cup! Celebrate the passion and pride with Melody4U.

items.image_prompt: A modern warm cinematic social media poster depicting a symbolic motorsport track scene with a smartphone in the foreground showing the text 'Race Weekend Energy' in English. The tone is energetic fan hype with subtle glowing music notes and sound waves. No official logos, badges, real driver faces, or trademarked branding. Suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Facebook vertical 9:16 social poster.
items.reels_text: Get ready for the thrill of the Austrian Grand Prix! Experience the race weekend energy with Melody4U.

items.image_prompt: A warm, emotional cinematic social media poster showing a symbolic midsummer night scene with a family or child moment holding a smartphone displaying the text 'Svatojánská noc' in Czech. The tone is celebratory and cultural, with subtle glowing music notes and sound waves. No official logos, badges, or disturbing imagery. Suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Facebook vertical 9:16 social poster.
items.reels_text: Celebrate the magic of St. John’s Day with traditional Czech midsummer vibes and Melody4U.
